# kCFProxyHostNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

-  kCFProxyHostNameKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyHostNameKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyHostNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxyhostnamekey#Discussion)

A `CFString` value containing either the hostname or IP number of the proxy host.
